programme.desc: Kisah pemuda yang dibesarkan di komunitas supremasi kulit putih, mengubah arah hidupnya dari kekerasan dan kebencian

programme.title: American Rider
programme.desc: Seorang duda yang menyesali masa lalunya menempuh perjalanan lintas negara dengan motor untuk mencari penebusan, dan menyadari bahwa hidup adalah tentang terus maju, selangkah demi selangkah.

programme.title: The Resurrection Of Charles Manson
programme.desc: Ketika sepasang kekasih menyunting film Charles Manson di sebuah hotel, kejadian yang ada di dalam film kemudian menjadi kenyataan

programme.title: Game Of Death
programme.desc: Marcus, Seorang agen rahasia dikirim ke Detroit untuk melenyapkan seorang pengedar senjata gelap

programme.title: The Journey Is The Destination
programme.desc: Fotografer Dan Eldon tewas di Somalia pada usia 22 tahun. Dia meninggaklan buku catatan yang menceritakan hdupnya dari usia 14 tahun.

programme.title: Zathura: A Space Adventure
programme.desc: Dua saudara yang sering bertengkar terlempar ke luar angkasa saat memainkan permainan misterius yang mereka temukan di ruang bawah tanah.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Agen IMF Ethan Hunt bertarung melawan penyelundup senjata sadis yang mengancam nyawanya dan juga tunangannnya

programme.title: Sin City A Dame To Kill For
programme.desc: Beberapa warga Sin City yang berdarah panas berseteru dengan warga lainnya yang lebih ganas

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Segelintir penyintas di Inggris berusaha bertahan hidup setelah virus mematikan menyebar.

programme.title: Zoom (2006)
programme.desc: Mantan pahlawan super bernama Zoom dipanggil kembali untuk melatih sekelompok anak berkekuatan khusus agar menjadi generasi baru pahlawan penyelamat dunia.

programme.title: Hellboy (2004)
programme.desc: Seorang iblis yang diselamatkan dari Nazi, tumbuh besar menjadi pahlawan pembela menghadapi kekuatan kegelapan

programme.title: Monster Hunter (2020)
programme.desc: Ketika Kapten Artemis dan pasukannya yang setia terlempar ke dunia baru, mereka terlibat dalam pertempuran putus asa untuk bertahan hidup melawan musuh-musuh raksasa dengan kekuatan luar biasa.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: Kisah percobaan pembunuhan presiden yang diceritakan dalam lima perspektif yang berbeda

programme.desc: Ethan dan timnya melaksanakan tugas yang paling menantang, menghancurkan sindikat kriminal internasional.

programme.desc: Dua detektif LAPD yang memiliki pekerjaan sampingan menyelidiki kasus pembunuhan terhadap grup rap yang sedang naik daun.

programme.title: Pulau Hantu

programme.title: Senggol-Senggolan
programme.desc: Elvi dan Adi, yatim piatu pergi ke Jakarta untuk mencari Johny, seorang promotor pertunjukan yang pernah meminta Elvi bernyanyi di desanya.Sampainya disana mereka terpisah. Adi hidup gelandangan dan Elvi masuk rekaman dan sukses.

programme.title: Bidadari Pulau Hantu
programme.desc: Evan dan Gesti melakukan pemotretan pre-wedding di pulau yang dikenal sebagai pulau hantu. Pulau ini terkenal dengan sosok hantu perempuan yang membawa celurit dan menggunakan gaun pengantin.

programme.title: Sunan Kalijaga & Syech Siti Jenar
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang keadaan Majapahit setelah perang Paregreg. Keadaan sangat kacau dan rakyat banyak yang menderita. Lalu muncul masalah lagi, Syech Siti Jenar, wali yang nyeleneh, mengaku sebagai tuhan hingga dianggap menyeleweng

programme.title: Nazar
programme.desc: Cindy, cewek trendi yang benar-benar memenangkan mobil mewah dari undian tutup botol, mati-matian berusaha membatalkan nazar asal-asalannya.

programme.title: Sukarno

programme.title: Sang Pencerah

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Beda
programme.desc: Sepasang kekasih yang berbeda keyakinan Diana dan Cahyo. Namun saat mereka mulai mencoba melanjutkan ke jenjang yang lebih serius, orang tua mereka sangat bertentangan dengan rencana ini.

programme.title: Baby Blues

programme.title: Obama Anak Menteng

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Colombia and DR Congo play their second Group K game at the 2026 FIFA World Cup as they face each other in Guadalajara. Colombia opened their campaign against tournament debutants Uzbekistan and will be determined to make the most of their seventh appearance at the finals after missing out on the World Cup four years ago in Qatar. DR Congo, featuring in their first World Cup in 52 years, played Portugal in their opener and will be dreaming of qualifying for the knockout stages for the first time in their history. Laura Woods hosts the coverage, with studio analysis provided by Karen Carney and Jobi McAnuff, with commentary from Seb Hutchinson and Andros Townsend.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. The Belchers head off to a lake for some watersports, but Bob's decision to make a side trip to see his mother's grave first leads to problems as the grave map that Bob is given is impossible to read, the sun is setting fast, and the markers are buried in snow - meanwhile, Linda remains outside the graveyard stricken by a fear of death, and Teddy panics after accidentally eating forbidden meatloaf from the Belchers' fridge while doing some repair work.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Their son Mateja is a budding drummer while their daughter Mila enjoys everything from tap dancing to violin - to give everyone in this family their own space, Brian and Sarah turn an old garage into a kids' music and arts hangout.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Three single lads are hoping to win the heart of singer and social media handler Emily - gas pipe fitter Anthony, lifeguard Kai, and bodybuilding banker Sol are competing in a shopping challenge in Manchester and searching for the perfect outfit to win a date. Which of the three guys will Dress to Impress?

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. With school nearly out for summer and Arthur about to start a new school, Billie is left doubting whether she has made a good decision - meanwhile, Margot starts swimming lessons and Greg gets a job, but it seems that he is a bit out of practice. Elsewhere, Billie and Sue find Chatty in a bad way that results in a visit to hospital - when a worrying phone call to Billie follows, it sends their worlds into a spin and drastic measures need to be taken. With Chatty hitting rock bottom, Billie, Greg and Sue rally together to get Chatty booked into rehab - however, all is not as straightforward as they hoped.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: After some time away, Pete is back in Essex, and who's he checking in on first? Miss Chloe Sims, of course. It turns out the trip away has given him some time to reflect, and he's realised just how important their friendship is to him.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The women rally around Britani on the second day of the Milwaukee girls' trip as Lisa makes her own plans, Heather tells Whitney about the Prism rumours and causes her to clash with Meredith, and relationships are tested at a motorcycle-themed dinner where Lisa and Angie attempt to hash out their issues until Lisa crosses the line - meanwhile, Britani makes an announcement about her relationship and questions Bronwyn's true motives behind marrying an older man.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When six-month-old baby Alex Raines tragically dies, it seems at first like a case of cot death. However, when the cause of death is later diagnosed as shaken baby syndrome, Ronnie and Matt have a murder investigation on their hands. There are many possible suspects to look at, including the neglectful mother, the absent father, the resentful nanny and her short-tempered boyfriend. When the case reaches court, some new evidence comes to light which casts doubt over the prosecution's case. The very framework of the Raines family is pulled apart and James and Alesha must do some investigating of their own. Pitted against indefatigable barrister Helena Marsden, they must navigate through the family wreckage that Alex's death left behind with little more than a process of elimination to go on. When the truth is uncovered, has this heart-breaking tragedy left more than one victim?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A police investigation into a child's disappearance leads officers to a body with a note reading 'They Must be Destroyed.' DS Ronnie Brooks is deeply affected because the note is a terrifying echo of an old case in which he was involved. Six years before, unrepentant racist Andrew Dillon was convicted of killing three young boys from ethnic backgrounds. With Dillon still behind bars, it looks as though there may be a copycat killer picking up where he left off. Or is the reality different - and even more frightening? James Steel finds himself under intense scrutiny when it comes to light that he was the one who successfully prosecuted Dillon for the killings - and that his success was mainly due to 'selective prosecution.' Is Steel guilty of perverting the course of justice? Did he tamper with key evidence in order to win a conviction and secure a promotion?

When the body of a young drug addict is found in a flooded public lavatory, it appears that he is the victim of an overdose - Dr McKenzie, who has been summoned from a dinner engagement, sees no reason to question this and finds himself in an invidious position when the post-mortem reveals that the young man was murdered. DI Frost is then called upon to solve the mystery...

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. An old man obsessed with the memory of his dead son is the victim of a brutal attack. Greengrass unwisely offers to run the local car rally. Gina may have found true romance.

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the brutal murder of young physiotherapist Lizzie Faulkner, who was gunned down at a luxury country retreat - in a story of betrayal, guilt and the need for atonement, Vera must move quickly to avoid another tragedy. Meanwhile, Joe finally makes amends with the demons from his own past.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Suzanne Morton is brought into a hospital Accident and Emergency department with flu-like symptoms - and leaves in a body bag. Detectives Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin treat her case as suspicious as they investigate the department, which has had three similar deaths within six months. The ward was extremely busy the night Suzanne died, which makes their job tougher - can they find the killer before another victim is targeted? When the case comes to court, senior crown prosecutor Jacob Thorne is pulled in opposite directions as the chief suspect claims to have been framed for murder by others in his department. With a conspiracy of silence spreading through the hospital staff, it becomes clear that there is more to the case than meets the eye. In order to find the truth, the team must penetrate the hospital staff's web of professional loyalties.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: This episode, Safe, sees the team investigate the reported kidnapping of a small child. When two-year-old Ryan Stark goes missing from a high street merry-go-round, his distraught mother Kayla reports him kidnapped and a massive police hunt is launched to find the missing toddler. In spite of public appeals and additional manpower, the search seems to throw up more questions than answers. With the investigation seemingly going nowhere, the team have to dig deeper - and they discover that the child had a history with social services before he went missing. Armed with this new information, the team wonder whether Kayla is not being entirely truthful. But with more than one suspect and a complete lack of physical evidence, can they ever get to the bottom of what happened to baby Ryan?

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: Powerful murder mystery series. Perez reassesses the investigation in the aftermath of Jo's attack while needing to keep everyone on track, and the MIT arrives on Shetland. [S] S4 Ep5

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Detective drama series. A wealthy man tells Poirot that he intends to change his will and leave everything to his ward Violet Wilson, but when he is murdered before he can change the document, the old will is stolen from his solicitor's office. The local doctor soon comes under suspicion, but the cool-headed Poirot avoids jumping to conclusions.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The gripping crime drama continues with an episode in which there may be more to a seemingly cut-and-dried case than meets the eye. When call girl Katka Cizek is found dead in a pool of blood in an upmarket apartment, only one of her admirers seems to fit the bill for the culprit. He was with her on the night of her death, he does not have an alibi and he has everything to lose if his secret obsession with her were to be revealed. The evidence against him seems clear, and when the matter comes to trial, crown prosecutor Alesha Phillips is given the reins to lead the cross-examination. But as she looks further into the case, Alesha begins to suspect that someone has reason to frame the accused. As she digs deeper, determined to find the truth, she uncovers a shattering betrayal which proves that there are no winners in this case.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The police are called to investigate a horrifying gun attack which has left a nightclub peppered with bullets and two victims bleeding out on the floor. But the shocks do not end there, as the shooters begin a deadly rampage through the streets of London. With the media swarming over the case and a hostage in danger, Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin find themselves up against the clock as they desperately hunt down the Bonnie-and-Clyde duo responsible for the bloody massacre. When the violent pair are brought to trial, defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone claims that one of the two suspects was more innocent victim than vicious killer. Was the defendant acting out of fear after being beaten and bullied into submission by her partner-in-crime? Aware that there are two sides to every story, the team are under pressure to ensure that someone is held responsible for a murderous spree which has claimed five lives.

programme.title: Battlebots

With the selection committee watching their every move, it's up to the bots to deliver show-stopping performances and prove that they belong amongst the best bots in the world - it's nonstop action and carnage, and i all builds to a kill-or-be-killed Main Event between superstars End Game and HyperShock.

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: Jeter makes an impact with the Yankees, winning a title in his first season, and discovers that stardom has a price. Jeter becomes the leader of a team considered by many to be the best in baseball history.

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: The importance of the Jeters' loyalty and trust, as the Yankees complete a triple victory over the New York Mets, distorts his friendship with Alex Rodríguez.
programme.category: Temporada 1 Episodio 3 - I Don't Have to Be Your Best Friend

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: The Yankee dynasty ends and we explore the impact of 9/11 on New York. The old feud between the Yankees and the Boston Red Sox is decided in an epic Game 7.

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: The Yankees and Jeter suffer the most memorable defeat in baseball history. Jeter's identity is under attack as he faces challenges in the press, on the field and in his clubhouse.
programme.category: Temporada 1 Episodio 5 - Hiding in Plain Sight

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: Jeter wins his fifth and final World Series and celebrates his 3,000th hit, but not everything is easy for this aging superstar. He goes through a difficult public contract negotiation that changes his relationship with the Yankees.
programme.category: Temporada 1 Episodio 6 - Never Gave Up a Day in My Life

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: Derek and Hannah Jeter share intimate details of their difficult journey to parenthood. Jeter achieves another dream by becoming owner of the Miami Marlins, but his journey is plagued by criticism and unfinished business.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves stars in 47 Ronin, an epic fantasy where an outcast joins samurai on a quest for vengeance and honor against a ruthless overlord in ancient Japan.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Setelah seorang panglima perang yang berkhianat membunuh tuan mereka dan membuang kaum mereka, 47 samurai tanpa pemimpin bersumpah untuk membalas dendam dan mengembalikan kehormatan kepada kaum mereka.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen berada di Distrik 13 setelah ia menghancurkan dunia game selamanya. Di bawah kepemimpinan Presiden Coin dan nasihat dari teman-teman kepercayaannya, Katniss mengembangkan sayapnya saat ia berjuang menyelamatkan Peeta dan bangsa yang tergerak oleh keberaniannya.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Sebuah pesawat penumpang yang mengalami kecelakaan terdampar di sebuah planet yang bermandikan sinar matahari. Namun nyawa para korban selamat mulai terancam ketika monster-monster karnivora muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Es di kutub telah mencair, dan bumi ditutupi oleh air. Manusia-manusia yang tersisa pergi mengarungi lautan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Battleship (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Armada kapal terpaksa bertempur melawan armada yang asal-usulnya tidak diketahui untuk mengungkap dan menggagalkan tujuan destruktif mereka.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 2
programme.desc: Katniss dan tim pemberontak dari Distrik 13 bersiap untuk pertempuran terakhir yang akan menentukan nasib Panem.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Es di kutub telah mencair, dan bumi ditutupi oleh air. Manusia-manusia yang tersisa pergi mengarungi lautan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Dua sahabat, mantan biksu Shaolin, berpisah saat mereka berhadapan dengan pemberontakan yang sedang berlangsung melawan pemerintah. Yang satu ambisius dan bangkit menjadi komandan militer yang kuat, sementara temannya yang dikhianati mempelajari teknik Tai Chi yang tenang.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Seorang taipan korup membunuh saksi kejahatan. Hanya pacar seorang pengusaha yang memiliki hubungan dengan pemerintah Tiongkok yang melihat kejadian tersebut. Pengawal dari Beijing membantu polisi Hong Kong melindunginya. Namun, ia dan saksi tersebut mulai memiliki perasaan, yang memperumit keadaan.

programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games

programme.title: Hard Target

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1

programme.title: Abroad

programme.title: The Unfair
programme.desc: Sebuah protes menentang pembaharuan kota berujung pada kematian seorang polisi dan seorang remaja. Ayah remaja itu ditangkap atas kematian polisi tersebut. Seorang pengacara muda pun ditugaskan untuk membelanya.

programme.title: Waiting For Rain
programme.desc: Seorang siswa tanpa tujuan mendapatkan kembali gairah hidupnya ketika dia mulai menulis surat kepada teman lama sekelasnya.

programme.title: Honest Candidate 2

programme.desc: Film ini didasarkan pada kisah anekdotal tentang hubungan kerja antara Kim Dae-jung dan ahli strategi politiknya, Uhm Chang-rok. Seo Chang-dae adalah seorang ahli strategi politik yang mengutamakan kemenangan di atas segalanya, sedangkan Kim Woon-beom adalah seorang politisi dengan ambisi menjadi presiden terkemuka. Namun, konflik internal dalam kampanye muncul saat Seo Chang Dae mendesak Kim Woon Bum untuk melakukan beberapa taktik curang.

programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri yang menerima penyelesaian perceraian kehilangan ingatan mereka karena sebuah kecelakaan. Mereka jatuh cinta lagi, sehingga keluarga mereka berusaha mengembalikan ingatan mereka untuk menyelesaikan perceraian.

programme.title: The Bad Guys: Reign Of Chaos
Waiting For Rain
programme.desc: Seorang siswa tanpa tujuan mendapatkan kembali gairah hidupnya ketika dia mulai menulis surat kepada teman lama sekelasnya.

programme.title: Honest Candidate 2 (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Joo Sang-sook, yang gagal memenangkan pemilihan walikota Seoul dengan mengungkap kebenaran di tv nasional, secara tiba-tiba menjadi sorotan setelah menyelamatkan seorang pemuda yang tenggelam.

programme.title: The Long Way Home (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Dua tentara, seorang warga Korea Selatan paruh baya dan seorang remaja Korea Utara, bertemu di Front Barat selama Perang Korea. Tak lama setelah perebutan sebuah tank, mereka menyadari bahwa mereka berdua adalah korban perang dan membentuk persaudaraan.

programme.title: New World
programme.desc: Kang, kepala kepolisian, memerintahkan polisi yang menyamar, Ja-Seoung, untuk berpartisipasi dalam proyek Dunia Baru. Namun, Ja-Seoung harus memilih antara mengikuti perintah Kang atau tetap setia kepada Jeong Cheong.

programme.title: Countdown (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang penagih utang menderita kanker hati dan harus mendapatkan transplantasi hati dalam sepuluh hari. Seorang penipu bersedia mendonorkan hatinya jika ia bisa melacak pria yang memasukkannya ke dalam penjara.

programme.title: Veteran
programme.desc: Seorang polisi yang jujur ​​mencari keadilan bagi orang biasa melawan segala rintangan. Seorang anak laki-laki kaya ingin membalas dendam pada polisi.

programme.title: Three Sisters
programme.desc: Tiga saudara perempuan bertemu kembali untuk ulang tahun ayah mereka, namun tindakan aneh yang dilakukan saudara laki-laki mereka mengungkap masa lalu mereka yang kelam.

programme.title: War of The Arrows
programme.desc: Dua kakak beradik, Nam Yi dan Ja In melarikan diri ketika desa dan keluarga mereka diserang tentara Manchu dari Dinasti Qing.13 tahun kemudian, Nam Yi tumbuh menjadi pemanah yang hebat. Sementara Ja In akan dinikahkan dengan putra keluarga Kim Mu Seon, keluarga yang merawat mereka. Namun, pembantaian terjadi dan Ja in diculik.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Dubai – the largest and most important Motor Sow in the Middle East takes place here. The sheikhs have a penchant for fast and exclusive vehicles, so everything that has a reputation in the car world is gathered here. And: Supercars go straight from the stand in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: A small car and a super sports car with the same drive concept? That actually exists. The Porsche GT3 and the Smart both have rear-wheel drive, i.e. the engine in the rear and driven rear wheels. In general, vehicles with rear-wheel drive and rear-wheel drive are considered sporty, emotional, but also a bit unpredictable. Does that apply to these two? Also on the show: The sportiest mid-range sedan on the market. Of course with rear-wheel drive: The BMW 3 Series. Rear-wheel drive across vehicle classes – in Perfect Ride. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: In 1999, a new star in the roadster sky is expected to shake up the highly competitive market. The Honda S2000 comes to us as a pure athlete with rear-wheel drive and 240 hp from just 2.0 liters of displacement. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Some of the most traditional motorcycle brands in the world come from Great Britain. Manufacturers such as AJS, BSA, Norton, Triumph and Vincent set standards in terms of performance and drivability and were also always at the forefront of motorcycle racing. Today Triumph alone holds the flag of British motorcycle construction high, especially in the so-called modern classics. We get to the bottom of the myth of the British Way of Motorbiking - with test drives of exciting motorcycle models and with a bike trip over the varied and challenging roads of Scotland. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Abdulaziz Al Faisal is a Saudi prince and one of Arabia's most famous racing drivers. We accompany the prince on the day of one of the most important races of his career. His toughest competitor is the Austrian Clemens Schmid, who starts from pole position. An exciting race is coming up. Countless attempts by the prince to overtake go wrong. Shortly before the end, Schmid makes a fatal mistake (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The origin story of a car is a closely guarded secret. For the first time, it was possible to look over the shoulders of the developers for five years. From the idea to the finished car. 2003 – The automotive industry is healthy and stronger than ever. The supply and demand system works. But what about a new model that was decided in these good times and will now come onto the market in the crisis? (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are considered the epitome of a sports car, they are breathtaking and irresistible, the coupes from Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati and Alfa Romeo. Designed by the world's most famous designers, each Italian sports car is as excitingly beautiful as a work of art. Whether 8 or 12 cylinder, every engine is more than just a machine, every engine is a masterpiece. Whether Ferrari 488, Ferrari FF, Lamborghini Huracan and Aventador or Maserati Gran Coupe, DreamCars presents the most fascinating Italian coupes. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Lots of chrome, free-standing lamp pots, bulbous fenders, swelling shapes wherever you look – typical pre-war look. The Triumph 1800 was the British manufacturer's first new design after the Second World War. The four-seater with a mother-in-law seat, presented in 1947, established the long tradition of the British post-war roadster. The 1800 is not a tough corner robber, but rather a comfortable tourer for leisurely country trips. Also in the show: BMW 507 and Porsche 356 Cabrio. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: A world record of superlatives. The Porsche Taycan enters the Guinness Book of Records. Also: The hydrogen Hyundai Nexo, at the Hockenheimring with Walter Röhrl and the Skoda Trekka from the 1960s. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: And the Lamborghini legend begins with the name. Chronicle of the bullfight in 1879. In the arena of Cordoba, a bull resists the torreros and survives despite being stabbed 24 times. His name: Murcielago (station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we introduce a man who made history in motorsports. He won the 24-hour race four times in a row: Olaf Manthey. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: 125 years of Mercedes Benz - The largest Mercedes Benz meets at Berlin Tempelhof Airport with lots of highlights such as the legendary Silver Arrows and their even more legendary drivers, visitors and classic vehicles from all over the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The open-air season can start with these three convertibles! Smart is sending the latest version of its roofless dwarf to dealers. It is available as a 3-cylinder petrol engine with 71 or 90 hp. The Mini Convertible is bigger – and not just under the hood. It offers space for four people and the output ranges from 105 to 190 hp. When it comes to pure roadster feeling, there can only be one – the Mazda MX-5. The fourth generation of the topless classic in Perfect Ride. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Super Seven – when you hear these words, car fans first think of Lotus. Because Colin Chapman developed the open kit racer, i.e. a kit car, in the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. Swiss tuning dreams come true at Auto Emotion in Bern. Tuning looks under the hood of the Alpine countries. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Danger in your neck and still in a good mood? No problem for the full professionals at Action Concept. Spectacular stunts are her job – and her passion! Explosions, flights, jumps, breathtaking images and exciting behind-the-scene stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg visits the Classic Expo in Salzburg, where he speaks with organizer Hermann Schwarz and several fellow classic car enthusiasts. In between, a short detour takes you to the famous auction of the Toffen Oldtimer Gallery in Switzerland before returning to Salzburg. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Sand, water, rubble, snow, no matter what surface or weather, it should be able to handle it all! The Porsche 911 Dakar is one of the most extreme series 11s of all time. With its ancestor, the Porsche 953, the manufacturer won the legendary Paris Dakar Rally in 1984. The model is a homage to this sensational success. We test the extraordinary 911 off-road. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: The documentary series offers a unique insight into modern British policing. Camera teams follow police officers as they try to maintain order on England's streets. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's show is all about: premium performance. Because these two crackers deliver both in their own, unique way and with future-oriented drives. We were exclusively at the world premiere of the Mercedes CLA in Rome and revealed all the details about design, technology and features. Also: Six exciting facts about the ultimate station wagon, the BMW M5 Touring! (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.sub-title: VW all-wheel drive on snow and ice
programme.desc: We're doing the ultimate winter test in the Arctic Circle! Three of the latest Volkswagen all-wheel drive vehicles, the Golf R, Tiguan and ID.4 GTX, compete against each other on snow and ice in Sweden. Which VW delivers the most driving fun, the best control and the wildest drifts? From classic combustion engines to electric precision, we show how each model masters the icy curves. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Italy, Ski Division, Olbia
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike Class Pro World Championship starts a new action-packed season. The registered pilots promise exciting races on the water again this year. (Station info).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Lots of chrome, free-standing lamp pots, bulbous fenders, swelling shapes wherever you look – typical pre-war look. The Triumph 1800 was the British manufacturer's first new design after the Second World War. The four-seater with a mother-in-law seat, presented in 1947, established the long tradition of the British post-war roadster. The 1800 is not a tough corner robber, but rather a comfortable tourer for leisurely country trips. Also in the show: BMW 507 and Porsche 356 Cabrio. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: A world record of superlatives. The Porsche Taycan enters the Guinness Book of Records. Also: The hydrogen Hyundai Nexo, at the Hockenheimring with Walter Röhrl and the Skoda Trekka from the 1960s. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: And the Lamborghini legend begins with the name. Chronicle of the bullfight in 1879. In the arena of Cordoba, a bull resists the torreros and survives despite being stabbed 24 times. His name: Murcielago (station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we introduce a man who made history in motorsports. He won the 24-hour race four times in a row: Olaf Manthey. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: 125 years of Mercedes Benz - The largest Mercedes Benz meets at Berlin Tempelhof Airport with lots of highlights such as the legendary Silver Arrows and their even more legendary drivers, visitors and classic vehicles from all over the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The open-air season can start with these three convertibles! Smart is sending the latest version of its roofless dwarf to dealers. It is available as a 3-cylinder petrol engine with 71 or 90 hp. The Mini Convertible is bigger – and not just under the hood. It offers space for four people and the output ranges from 105 to 190 hp. When it comes to pure roadster feeling, there can only be one – the Mazda MX-5. The fourth generation of the topless classic in Perfect Ride. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Super Seven – when you hear these words, car fans first think of Lotus. Because Colin Chapman developed the open kit racer, i.e. a kit car, in the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Carbon fiber on motorcycles – does that make sense? Carbon: The fabric structure of the magical material from Formula 1 shimmers with high quality. Highly priced, but ultra stable and ultra light and therefore extremely attractive for racing and street motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: The oil states in the Gulf – Actually everything here is big, bigger, biggest. Only an exclusive group of people like it Mini. Why? How can such a small car put such a big smile on people's faces? Fans come to the mini-festival from all over Arabia. Our research for mini-crazy people starts right here, in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: An inconspicuous industrial building in Regensburg, Bavaria. The most innovative German bicycle manufacturer is currently based here: PG Bikes. The Regensburg-based company develops and produces electric bikes with a retro look. The boss and idea generator of PG Bikes is 33-year-old Manuel Ostner. After owning his own scooter workshop, he began pimping up bicycles and eventually producing e-bikes. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are spectacular and environmentally friendly, the most extravagant and fastest electric and hybrid cars in the world: whether Tesla, McLaren P1, Ferrari La Ferrari or Renovo Coupe, the battery- and hybrid-powered cars impress not only with their fascinating design, but also with intelligent technology, breathtaking acceleration and unique dynamics. Dream Cars presents the most exciting e-cars in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Their reputation is legendary, rally enthusiasts adore them: the monster rally cars of the so-called Group B. At the beginning of the 80s, a new classification entered rally sport. Suddenly turbocharged all-wheel-drive racing vehicles with up to 500 hp race across the international slopes. The drivers can barely control the vehicles, but with their sound and unbridled power they exert a huge fascination. Only the most serious accidents with dead drivers and fans put an end to the absolute irrationality. Today these cars enjoy cult status and are expensive collector's items. Also legendary: the BMW M E30 in the DTM version. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: If there is a typical BMW, it is the BMW 3 Series. It's fast, it's cult, it's the epitome of the sports sedan: the BMW 3 Series. Since its debut in 1975, the 3 Series has been the undisputed leader of the premium segment. More than 13 million customers worldwide have chosen a BMW 3 Series. The 3 Series is the right car for every requirement: it is a family sedan, sports car, tuning object and racing car. Car History shows all models and the entire history of the '3 Series'. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many racers at heart race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the Green Hell is a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The latest innovations in the automotive industry have been presented in Paris since 1898. This makes the Paris Motor Show the oldest trade fair in the world and provides an insight into the automotive world of tomorrow. One attempt by manufacturers is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Under the slogan "think new", Volkswagen wants to introduce 20 new electric models by 2020 and finally put the diesel scandal behind it. In addition to the drive of the future, Perfect Ride presents the manufacturers' design visions. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Rearview mirror puts the NSU Ro 80 in the spotlight today. With its revolutionary aerodynamic body and its new engine technology, a Wankel engine, it caused a sensation when it first appeared in 1967. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Pimping, boarding, showing off - today's topics in tuning: Racing flounder with motorcycle power - we're hitting the Hockenheimring in magic X one. Full blast: The D1 Drift Championship – driving sideways at the absolute limit. Tuning EXPO Saarbruecken: 1000 cars, 230 exhibitors and the choice of the Tuning Expo Cover Girl (channel info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are on tour! On an industrial site in Thuringia they find the ideal place to jump with their stunt car across a moving truck trailer. Problem: the trailer is brand new and must under no circumstances be broken... A special challenge for stunt coordinator Domi and his team! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, presenter Martin Utberg accompanies visitors to the Cars & Friends event at the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk in Anger near Salzburg through a weekend full of automotive passion and enthusiasm. The focus throughout the day will be on motorsport legends Walter Röhrl, Christian Geistdörfer and Hans Joachim Strietzel Stuck, who will create enormous enthusiasm among visitors. Top Speed ​​is also taking part in the celebrations surrounding the 50th anniversary of the VW Golf GTI, where hundreds of Golf owners from Germany and Austria travel to the dream factory. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Italy, Ski Division, Olbia

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Spalatin Historic, a one-day classic car rally in aid of a good cause. Together with organizer Stefan von Heyden, Martin discovers the Franconian region. During the various breaks, entertaining special stages ensure many smiling faces among participants and spectators. In this program, Top Speed ​​also takes viewers to Lucerne, where Martin gets involved behind the scenes at a classic car auction by the Oldtimer Galerie Toffen at the Swiss Classic World. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: Bitter fights for championship titles, fierce duels for race victories and even disputes between teammates: motorsport has been characterized by feuds since its early days. Even in Formula 1 there are always heated rivalries and duels. The Racing Files looks at the exciting battles for world championship titles in the premier class of formula racing. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Assistance systems that are normal in cars usually seem exotic or even unthinkable on two-wheelers. However, this no longer applies to the blind spot warning system, which BMW is now offering for the first time. Ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new maxi scooter C 650 GT. We test the new 60 hp large scooter including the assistance system in Valencia and find out in heavy rush hour traffic whether Side View Assist is an annoying paternalism - or perhaps a real help that could soon also come to motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good condition, others a little polished, the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: For the first time, it was possible to look over the shoulders of the developers for five years. From the idea to the finished car. After a design competition, eight models are shortlisted. Eight comparable vehicles will be presented to 500 test customers. A jury will propose two of the models for the final. The last big design decision has been made. Today there is a winner. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: How will we transport goods and people in the future? The pack mules on our roads are also evolving and moving with the times. VW is working with Ford to save costs and pool expertise on the new van. At Volvo, safety has always been a priority – and that also applies to its trucks. And 5 exciting facts about the Mercedes eCitaro NMC4. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar F-Type, Aston Martin Vanquish Volante or Bentley Continental, English convertibles are elegant and exclusive and, they are fun. English convertibles enjoy cult status all over the world because, after all, the fun of open and fast two-seaters was invented in England. English roadsters offer more sporting spirit than any other, equipped with power, luxury and elegance, they are the most fascinating convertibles of all. Rolls Royce Phantom Drophead, Jaguar F-Type or Aston Martin Vanquish Volante, Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking English convertibles of all time. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The US brand Cadillac from Detroit stands for the American way of drive and exuberant luxury made in the USA. The Cadillac Series 62 Convertible from 1949 was the first US car to have the famous and often quoted tail fins. A beefy V8 engine, automatic transmission and electric top are a given for a Caddy of this era. Classic Ride revives the American Way of Drive with the tailfin monster. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In addition to the classic Sportback variant, Audi also offers the A3 as a sedan. We subjected this model to extensive practical testing. Also: the Lexus RX, the revised version of the premium SUV from Toyota's luxury brand on the test site in Ibiza. And: Volkswagen is also launching a new model variant of the e-Up! after. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: They are square and angular, round and beautiful. Solid and safe, indestructible and comfortable: The old Swedes from Volvo. Every model is a classic, every model is a car to dream about. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: When you glide the car on two tires, that's it, we're on tour. Today in Dinslaken and that is the hometown of the Bosslé Helldrivers and it has been a huge family business for forty years. They show us a crazy stunt show and we're there! (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The coupe shape makes cars sexy. It's partly a question of faith and partly a question of utility whether you choose a classic two-door coupé like the Mercedes E400 - or the big brother CLS with four doors. The trendsetter of the coupé-limousine has had a number of imitators. The VW Arteon competes with the CLS in a different price segment. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. Lotus blossoms, lowriders and lascivious sluts - these are among the topics in tuning today. The test team goes full throttle again and chases the Komo-Tec Elise with 230 hp on the Nordschleife. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: This episode of Stunt Heroes is all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch called Knobi. He drives over a ramp at 50 km/h and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other. The dangerous thing about the stunt: several gasoline barrels explode at the same time! If something goes wrong, Knobi is also in danger.... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: At the Retro Classics in Stuttgart, presenter Martin Utberg is one of the crowd pullers at the trade fair with his daily stage talks in Hall 10. He welcomes two prominent guests per day in front of a large live audience and talks to them about motorsport, personal experiences and the fascination of classic automobiles. In part 2, Martin speaks to several guests. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a racetrack icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's show is all about: premium performance. Because these two crackers deliver both in their own, unique way and with future-oriented drives. We were exclusively at the world premiere of the Mercedes CLA in Rome and revealed all the details about design, technology and features. Also: Six exciting facts about the ultimate station wagon, the BMW M5 Touring! (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Supermoto: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship
FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Sandokan: Pirate of Malaysia
programme.desc: Filmed in Singapore it tells the story of Sandokan who is a Malaysian rebel who, with a group of renegades, goes up against a British General who is trying to force the King to resign.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: Sandokan: Pirate of Malaysia
programme.desc: Filmed in Singapore it tells the story of Sandokan who is a Malaysian rebel who, with a group of renegades, goes up against a British General who is trying to force the King to resign.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.desc: After escaping from a courtroom during his trial, a major criminal plans the biggest bank robbery ever to have taken place in the country.

programme.title: The Red King
programme.desc: An identification is made of the body and Grace is keen to prove it was murder, but a murder investigation team arrive from the mainland and take over proceedings.

programme.title: The Red King
programme.desc: A huge storm hits the island, forcing Grace to spend time with all the locals under the same roof; Grace continues to investigate Cai's death; Silas provides an interesting lead, The True Way.

programme.title: The Red King

programme.title: The Red King
programme.desc: Owen and Winter think they're helping the case by conducting an illegal search of Gruffudd's house, but their actions prompt an angered response from an exhausted and unwell Grace.

programme.title: The Red King
