programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: S1 E3Dr. Clark and medical student Luke Hawkins treat a two-year-old who was having a seizure.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E72 — Power convertibles They offer driving fun with a guarantee: classic convertibles with a lot of tinder. This species includes, for example, the Sunbeam Tiger. Under the hood of the compact roadster is a powerful V8 engine from Ford USA.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Episode 7The show presents the latest trends and innovations from the automotive industry.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 E21 — RenaultThe show introduces the new Renault brand series with their unusual design. The company made automotive history with its R4 and R5 small cars. Now the design is being modernized.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E23 — Tourists in the Green Hell 23 Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Dubai Motor ShowEvery two years the Dubai Motor Show gets bigger and bigger, with more than 100,000 visitors expected for the eleventh edition for the first time. More than 500 cars will be on display. The question is, how can someone attract attention?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S3 E16 — Rear-wheel drive for everyoneThe Porsche GT3 and the Smart both have rear-wheel drive, i.e. the engine in the rear and driven rear wheels. In general, rear- and rear-wheel drive vehicles are considered sporty, emotional, but also a bit unpredictable.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S1 E13 — Adler AutobahnIn this issue of the magazine: 1999, a new star in the roadster sky is supposed to shake up the highly competitive market. The Honda S2000 comes to us as a pure athlete with rear-wheel drive and 240 hp from just 2.0 liters of displacement.

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: S1 E4The mobile trauma team is called to a man who has been stabbed and hit in the head. Paramedic Ste Hill also looks after Dave, who suffered a panic attack while driving with his two young sons.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: S1 — British Way of Motorbiking The most traditional motorcycle brands in the world come from Great Britain. Manufacturers such as AJS, BSA, Norton, Triumph and Vincent set standards in terms of performance and drivability and were influential in motorcycle racing. Today Triumph alone holds the flag of British motorcycle construction high. The episode gets to the bottom of this myth - with test drives of various motorcycle models and a bike trip over the varied and challenging roads of Scotland.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S3 — Episode 34Abdulaziz Al Faisal is a Saudi prince and one of the most famous racing drivers in Arabia. We accompany the prince on the day of one of the most important races of his career. His toughest competitor is the Austrian Clemens Schmid, who starts from pole position. An exciting race is coming up. Countless attempts by the prince to overtake go wrong. Shortly before the end, Schmid makes a fatal mistake.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S1 E11 — BMW Development Part 1The story of how a car was created is shown, from the idea to the finished product. Over a period of five years, developers were looked over the shoulders for the first time.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Economically ecologicalThis documentation presents the development of sustainability in the automotive industry. The latest research and environmentally friendly concepts at the car shows are presented and various aspects are taken into account.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: S1 E11 — Italian CoupesThey are considered the epitome of a sports car, they are breathtaking and irresistible, the coupes from Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati and Alfa Romeo. Whether it's an eight- or twelve-cylinder engine, each one is more than just a machine, they are masterpieces.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S2 E25 — Episode 25We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Convertibles for country trips Lots of chrome, free-standing lamp pots, bulbous fenders, swelling shapes wherever you look - typical pre-war look. The Triumph 1800 was the British manufacturer's first new design after the Second World War.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E16 — Episode 16The Porsche Taycan has entered the Guinness Book of Records with a world record.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: LamborghiniThe myth of the Lamborghini begins with the name. In the bullring of Córdoba in 1879, a bull survived despite being stabbed 24 times. Its name was Murciélago - just like the Lamborghini coupe that was presented at the Frankfurt IAA in 2001.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E9 — Tourists in the Green Hell 9 Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: 125 Years of MercedesThe show is located at a historical monument, Berlin-Tempelhof Airport, which is no longer an airport. It is not for nothing that Mercedes-Benz chose this unique historical location to celebrate its 125th birthday.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S3 E17 — Fresh Air Fun During the open air season, three new convertibles from Smart, Mini and Mazda are put to the test.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S2 E16 — Colin Chapman's Kit-CarSuper Seven: When you hear these words, every car fan first thinks of Lotus. Colin Chapman developed the open kit racer, i.e. a kit car, in the 1950s.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S1 E14 — Cult Society FestivalThe show reports on Auto Emotion in Bern, where Swiss tuning dreams come true.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Drift, Fly & FirePaul must slide under an exploding vehicle while Anna is catapulted into the air.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E227 — Classic Expo Salzburg 2025Moderator Martin Utberg visits the Classic Expo in Salzburg, where he talks to organizer Hermann Schwarz and several old-timer friend friends.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 — Porsche 911 DakarThe Porsche 911 Dakar is one of the most extreme series 11s of all time. With its ancestor, the Porsche 953, the manufacturer won the legendary Paris Dakar Rally in 1984. The model is a homage to this sensational success.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: S7 E3 — A Bar BrawlHandler Darryl must break up a bar brawl in Exeter city center. Meanwhile, Ashburton Auxiliary Police are searching two homes.

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: S4 E3 — Episode 3We accompany the young Canadian racing driver Damon Surzyshyn and the racing team TechSport Racing.

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: E8The show showcases some of the best motorsport moments, from karts to Formula One.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: S14 — Ride Thailand 2025, Motorcycle Adventure Northern Thailand Part 5The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not only for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas, making this region a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E71 — Premium PerformanceThis time the Mercedes CLA is presented in Rome and six facts about the BMW M5 Touring are provided.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: S3 E88 — VW all-wheel drive on snow and iceWe're doing the ultimate winter test in the Arctic Circle! Three latest Volkswagen all-wheel drive vehicles – Golf R, Tiguan and ID.4 GTX – compete against each other on snow and ice in Sweden.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E233 — Fascination Mercedes S-ClassIt is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world - a synonym for comfort and opulence - and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: The Mercedes S-Class. But why is that?

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: S7 E15Darryl travels to Exmouth to support colleagues on an operation involving a man who is threatening his family. Meanwhile, Roger and Mark are waiting on the highway for a car that is suspected of transporting drugs.

programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks.

programme.desc: S1 E7 — Family TiesYoung talent Antoine Bernède explains why he moved from PSG to Salzburg. The draw for the group stage of the Champions League is also eagerly awaited.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E9 — No F****** Friendly MatchAnticipation, excitement, disappointment: The final episode is tough when FC Red Bull Salzburg takes on Liverpool at the legendary Anfield Road.

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: Berlin - SalzburgThree players with a tough past come to train at the Red Bull Academy in Salzburg. Previously they struggled to assert themselves due to poor health, lack of self-confidence or lack of support.

programme.title: Neymar Jr. Full Access
programme.desc: S1 E248 hours until the derby: Neymar Jr. between home, focus and stadium pressure - an exclusive look behind the scenes of a superstar before the big game.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Goal KickThe team is close to bringing Rasmus Kristensen into the squad. Meanwhile, Patrick Farkas talks about the upcoming competition as the team prepares for the first game of the season away against Rapid Vienna.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Playing under pressureFive football talents under the age of 19 are fighting for their future at RB Leipzig. Before the first game, the pressure among them is already growing immensely as the coaches watch them closely and check who can make the jump.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Struggling to break throughThe pressure is growing at RB Leipzig: Nani Mekonnen gets his chance in first team training, while Dominic Minz unfortunately has to tremble after his red card. What the team needs even more now is a win.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E5 — Totally realThe episode presents the game between Real Madrid and FC Red Bull Salzburg in 2019. The referee and sporting director Christoph Freund also goes into more detail about the history of FC Red Bull Salzburg.

programme.title: WHOOP UCI Mountainbike Weltcup
programme.desc: The broadcast of the races of the UCI Mountain Bike World Cup.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E9 — Spectacular ViewsThe show reports on the best extreme athletes on their adventures. This includes, for example, kayaking through Canada's Keyhole Falls or a city tour of Istanbul in a Formula 1 car.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series
programme.desc: High speed in the Alps: The highlights from La Thuile show downhill mountain biking on fast, technical trails where courage, precision and control are crucial.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series
programme.desc: E81 — Loudenvielle, HighlightsLoudenvielle-Peyragudes is a dramatic setting for downhill mountain bike racing. Watch highlights from the competition set against the backdrop of the beautiful French countryside.

programme.title: WHOOP UCI Mountainbike Weltcup
programme.desc: E104 — Araxá, Round 1The start of the 2025 UCI Mountain Bike World Cup season leads to Brazilian terrain in Araxá.

programme.title: BIKE: Shires
programme.desc: Shires is a cycling film shot over two years and narrated by Rob Warner.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E3 — Endurance swimmer goes through hellExtreme sports, adventure and bizarre things on land and in the water.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E10 — Extreme Kayaking in South AmericaThe next challenge is upon us! In Chile, Brandon Semenuk wants to kayak across the three most challenging rivers in South America.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E9 — Spectacular ViewsThe show reports on the best extreme athletes on their adventures. This includes, for example, kayaking through Canada's Keyhole Falls or a city tour of Istanbul in a Formula 1 car.

programme.title: ÖKK Bike Revolution
programme.desc: The single trail network in Davos covers over 700 km and offers elite riders the ultimate cross-country playground. The flowing trails make Davos one of the most attractive bike destinations in the Alps.

programme.title: OUTDEH - The Youth of Jamaica
programme.desc: Three young Jamaicans tell their stories. Rapper Bakersteez hopes for an international career, Shama wants to become Jamaica's first pro surfer and Romar shows us life in his community.

programme.title: ADVENTURE: The Last Step
programme.desc: Small moments are just as crucial in an athlete's career as monumental victories. The show follows climbing, surfing and skating talents Kauli Vaast, Vincent Matheron and Oriane Bertone as they prepare for important events.

programme.title: MISSION 2TO4
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Test Rally TunisiaNew vehicle, new team, new game: Dakar champion Matthias Walkner swaps the bike for a buggy and starts the Dakar 2027 mission. This promises to be a comeback full of risks and new challenges.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Man OverboardIn 2013, Jimmy Smith made history with a furious comeback in the America's Cup. Ten years later, he wants to transform the US SailGP team into title contenders - but is thwarted by the team's owners.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: S1 E3 — SeriesTeam Italy is training diligently for the fifth season. Team USA wants to show courage.

programme.title: CLIFF DIVING: 444 Days – Aidan Heslops Comeback
programme.desc: 444 Days - Aidan Heslop's comebackFormer World Series champion Aidan Heslop is facing the toughest comeback of his career: In just 44 days, the Brit wants to get back to the top of the world and reclaim his place at 27 m.

programme.title: Red Bull Dolomitenmann
programme.desc: S1 E7 — 2025The Red Bull Dolomitenmann 2025: The toughest team competition in the world. At the 38th Red Bull Dolomitenmann, the athletes go far beyond their physical and mental limits.

programme.title: Pro Climbing League 2026: London – Highlights
programme.desc: 2026 London - HighlightsHead-to-head for the title: In London, the world's best climbers engage in an explosive knockout competition full of speed, pressure and precision on identical routes.

programme.title: Adventures Unpacked mit Beau Miles
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Paragliding over an active volcanoIn Tanzania, Tom de Dorlodot and Horacio Llorens fly over a volcano with a paraglider.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: DallasIn Dallas, the Red Bull soapbox race is celebrating its comeback: Between detailed replicas and completely crazy ideas, teams fight for victory with speed, courage and creativity.

programme.title: Skate Tales
programme.desc: S5 E5 — Dern BrothersMadars follows the Dern Brothers from Florida to California to watch them shake up skateboarding on YouTube.

programme.title: Red Bull Drop In Tour
programme.desc: Skate demo Down Under - Fat tricks through four citiesFour cities, one mission: The Red Bull Drop In Tour brings skate stars to Australia.

programme.title: SURF: Shaping Jordy
programme.desc: For the first time in 10 years, surfer Jordy Smith is spending the winter in his native South Africa. With the free surfing master Mikey February he goes in search of the best waves.

programme.title: Red Bull BC One
programme.desc: One World Final JapanExperience the rhythm of Tokyo as the top breakdancers battle for glory at the Red Bull BC One World Final.

programme.title: Musik-Event: Red Bull Soundclash 2024 - Rap versus Rave
programme.desc: Rap vs RaveIn Düsseldorf, the PSD Bank Dome is transformed into the arena for the wildest German rap highlight of the year: Team Blue, made up of rappers Summer Cem and KC Rebell, meets their rivals Ski Aggu and 01099 from Team Red.

programme.title: The Next Goal: Red Bull Bragantino
programme.desc: S1 E1 — New season aheadThe Brazilian team Red Bull Bragantino is looking forward to the start of the season. Coach Pedro Caixinha and his team have high hopes for this year. But a natural disaster poses a serious threat to the start of the season.

programme.title: The Next Goal: Red Bull Bragantino
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Back on the pitchAfter the floods, the league resumes play. The results vary.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E3 — Time to shineScouts watch the team as they look to overtake Wolfsburg and move into fourth place. Meanwhile, Lukas Schelenz is struggling for his future and Dominic Minz is waiting for the verdict on his appeal.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E4 — Too many distractionsOn the way to fourth place, the talent must stay focused as the pressure mounts.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E5 — RB LeipzigDecisive days are now approaching for four talents: Niclas Stierlin, Kilian Ludewig, Naod Nani Mekonnen and Emre Diego Aslan are all fighting for their chances, new contracts and to find their own way in professional football.

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: Paris - New YorkCircumstances have held back three players from Paris. Now they get another chance to establish themselves as professional soccer players and train with the New York Red Bulls.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E4 — MentalityCoach Jesse Marsch talks about the central role of mentality in the team before the game against Mattersburg. Once again, the viewer gets deep insights into the internals, whether in the dressing room, on the coaching bench or when planning tactics.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E8 — KönigsKlasseWhile the entire team is looking forward to the first Champions League game, coach Jesse Marsch is faced with a very difficult decision when nominating the squad.

programme.title: Red Bull BC One
programme.desc: One World Final JapanExperience the rhythm of Tokyo as the top breakdancers battle for glory at the Red Bull BC One World Final.

programme.title: Musik-Event: Red Bull Soundclash 2024 - Rap versus Rave
programme.desc: Rap vs RaveIn Düsseldorf, the PSD Bank Dome is transformed into the arena for the wildest German rap highlight of the year: Team Blue, made up of rappers Summer Cem and KC Rebell, meets their rivals Ski Aggu and 01099 from Team Red.

programme.title: MUSIC: Red Bull Symphonic Backstage - Loredana
programme.desc: Loredana provides exclusive insights into her greatest musical challenge: At Red Bull Symphonic she performs her hits accompanied by a symphony orchestra - a look behind the scenes.

programme.title: SURF: The Longest Wave - Legende Robby Naish
programme.desc: The rise of pioneer Robby Naish in global water sports over the last four decades is featured in the show. The 56-year-old used his skills to become a multiple windsurfing world champion in an amazing career that has also seen the success of kitesurfing, stand-up paddleboarding and foil surfing. But he also had to overcome some obstacles to get to the top of international surfing.

programme.title: SURF: What it Takes
programme.desc: Aussie rookie surfer Molly Picklum is battling through her first year on the WSL World Tour. A gripping look behind the scenes and an aspiring surfer's journey to the top.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: MadridIn Madrid, the Red Bull soapbox race becomes a wild descent: steep streets, creative vehicles and lots of speed make for a fast-paced spectacle with an uncertain outcome.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Racing
programme.desc: In Toulouse, the Red Bull Soapbox Race presents teams with the ultimate challenge: between speed, creativity and chaos, it is decided who can master the course best.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Racing: Top 50 Designs
programme.desc: Self-built racing cars, steep courses and lots of obstacles: the Red Bull soapbox race combines speed with chaos. The 50 most ingenious designs of the cult format.

programme.title: Skate Tales
programme.desc: S3 E2 — Takahiro MoritaMadars heads to Japan to meet Takahiro Morita, who, more than anyone else, has put his own unique stamp on Japanese skate culture.

programme.title: Skate Tales
programme.desc: S5 E3 — Dime Glory Challenge with Madars ApseMadars travels to Montreal to experience the chaos and creativity of the legendary Dime Glory Challenge.

programme.title: MUSIC: Red Bull Show 100 - extra
programme.desc: Austria's "AUT of ORDA" takes on the challenge of organizing their very first joint show in just 100 hours and performing it on stage after the countdown has ended. After the 100 hours, the show takes place in Vienna's Marx Hall.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing
programme.desc: E11 — WSL Tahiti ProTeahupo'o becomes the ultimate endurance test. At the Tahiti Pro 2025, one of the most dangerous waves in the world will challenge the surfing elite. Just a few meters from the line-up, courage and skill in the high waves decide whether you win or lose.

programme.title: SURF: Against Gravity
programme.desc: Born in the water, shaped by the ocean: Olympian and surfing professional Leon Glatzer talks about freedom, setbacks and his journey to the best surfing spots in the world.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E5 — RB LeipzigDecisive days are now approaching for four talents: Niclas Stierlin, Kilian Ludewig, Naod Nani Mekonnen and Emre Diego Aslan are all fighting for their chances, new contracts and to find their own way in professional football.

programme.title: Red Bull Jump & Run - Highlights
programme.desc: Four creator teams, three worlds and an obstacle run full of chaos: In Red Bull Jump & Run - Speedrun Edition, Papaplatte, Fibii & Co. fight for the fastest time in team play.

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family. Duty...
programme.desc: ...Power: The Price of Loyalty: Blinded by loyalty to his president and ignoring the advice of his family, George H.W. Bush was betrayed by Richard Nixon. (Part 2 of 6) (S)

programme.title: Egypt's Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Follow a team of archaeologists as they examine a rare mass grave dating to the collapse of ancient Egypt's Old Kingdom. (Part 2 of 2)

programme.title: WW2: Battle of Crete
programme.desc: Evacuation: Evacuation - Allied forces were evacuated off Crete's south coast in a dangerous operation that cost the lives of almost 1,000 British seamen and Allied soldiers. (Part 2 of 3) (S)

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Isles
programme.desc: Among the islands of the Hebrides there's one that can rightly claim to have a separate identity: Islay which was once the capital of the ancient Lordship of the Isles. (Part 4 of 6) (S)
